creator: hukeyue@vip.163.com
text:
I was unable to configure FREEBSD_HOST in poudriere. I will try it later.

FREEBSD_HOST=https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/freebsd
GIT_PORTSURL=mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/freebsd-ports/ports.git

(reported error)

  fetch: https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/freebsd/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/amd64/13.4-RELEASE/base.txz: Not Found
  fetch: https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/freebsd/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/amd64/13.4-RELEASE/base.txz: Unknown HTTP error
